vllm.title: [Hardware][Intel CPU] Adding intel openmp tunings in Docker file
vllm.author: zhouyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This patch adds more tunings for CPU backend on intel openmp.
These tunings improves CPU backend performance greatly, especially on throughput related tests.
This patch also updates the CPU docker file to run the serving endpoint as entry point by default

vllm.title: [Kernel][Model] logits_soft_cap for Gemma2 with flashinfer
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add logits_soft_cap for flashinfer, which is needed by Gemma2 model, also add a simple gemma2 test.

vllm.title: [VLM] Calculate maximum number of multi-modal tokens by model
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR further extends the multi-modal registry so that each model can specify its own maximum number of multi-modal tokens during memory profiling.
This replaces the function of the user-provided image_feature_size argument in vision language config that was recently removed by #6089.

vllm.title: [VLM] Improve consistency between feature size calculation and dummy data for profiling
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a follow-up to #6121 as a small refactoring to improve the consistency between max image feature size calculation and dummy data generation for profiling.
